nasb.text: Then he said, “Let me go, for the dawn is breaking.” But he said, “I will not let you go unless you bless me.”

esv.text: Then he said, “Let me go, for the day has broken.” But Jacob said, “I will not let you go unless you bless me.”

cnv.text: 那人說：“天快亮了，讓我走吧。”雅各說：“如果你不給我祝福，我就不讓你走。”

ccb.text: 那人说：“天亮了，让我走吧！”但雅各说：“你不祝福我，我就不让你走。”

csbs.text: 那人说：“天亮了，让我走吧！” 雅各说：“你不祝福我，我就不让你走。”
